name: Norfolk Southern Corporation
description: Norfolk Southern Corporation is a major American Class I freight railroad company headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia. It operates an extensive rail network spanning approximately 19,000 route miles across 22 states and the District of Columbia, primarily in the Eastern United States. The company provides essential transportation services, moving a diverse range of commodities including chemicals, agriculture, metals, construction materials, and automotive products. Norfolk Southern is a critical link in the global supply chain, connecting businesses to major Atlantic and Gulf Coast ports and facilitating efficient intermodal freight transportation across its vast service territory.
